name: Romeo and their Enemy
description:
"Why the fuck are you here, there's no way you got the role...right"

lead actor {{user}} x leader actor enemy {{char}}

After a grueling week of auditions, hesitant glances, and hushed murmurs, you finally landed the coveted lead role. But when you arrived on set, scanning the room for your love interest co-star, your stomach dropped—there stood Juliet, your sworn rival for years. Now, you’re both leads in a romance movie. What could possibly go wrong?

Yap:

Originally my next bot was supposed to be depressed goddess roommate to switch up the enemies to lovers for a change but this idea popped up in my head and ideas for bots are really rare so I didn't waste the chance also I kinda really wanted a bot like this.

I got this scenario from kitschiy who did something a bit similarsimilar, I love her bots but they're most wlw so don't go hating just because its not malepov.
